Story.100.2: When words fail, the sword shall speak.
Story.101.2: Every awakening brings a fresh start.
Story.102.2: As you lost all memories, an ancient gift finds its way to you.
Story.103.2: In the blink of an eye, the only place you could call home is taken away.
Story.104.2: Those without shelter must find a new place to weather the storm.
Story.105.2: The streets you once knew are now nothing but ghostly strangers.
Story.106.2: This is her story—and the story of the Ash District.
Story.107.2: A new way to make wishes...will it bring change, or unleash catastrophe?
Story.108.2: More often than not, the answers hide in plain sight.
Story.109.2: Sometimes, the simplest meals hold the greatest power to heal a wounded soul.
Story.111.2: The best way to fight amnesia is by creating more memorable moments.
Story.112.2: With the Grace Seal, you can do whatever you please.
Story.201.2: There will always be those who think they can trap wind in a cage.
Story.202.2: Those who mess with rules never know how to lose gracefully.
Story.203.2: A Trekker never loses to the same Stellaroid twice.
Story.204.2: The more benefits fall from the sky, the more carefully you must tread.
Story.205.2: Since they call us barbarians, we should really do something barbaric.
Story.206.2: People are judged by their clothes—because some can only see the clothes.
Story.207.2: Complex plans always come with unexpected consequences.
Story.208.2: There's more than one set of eyes watching you in the night.
Story.209.2: Don't the employees of the Chalk Consortium ever sleep?
Story.210.2: Raising the cost of your enemies is a weapon in itself.
Story.211.2: What must be protected is the lord—and everything the lord holds dear.
Story.212.2: Rules, money, and force—Feagin doesn't know how to lose.
Story.213.2: To fight a company, you must first become one.
Story.214.2: How do you put a price on a human soul?
Story.215.2: The war ends the moment it begins.
Story.216.2: Victory or defeat—it's decided in the blink of an eye.
Story.217.2: The journey of the stars and the tower begins in earnest.
Story.304.2: There's a strange "secretary" living in my phone.
Story.305.2: A pawn, power, destiny... The legendary Tyrant, am I?
Story.307.1: The Hidden Lord in the Forest
Story.307.2: In tales, the greatest masters are always found in the humblest of places.
Story.308.2: Time for a little brain teaser.
Story.310.2: Fear is a ghost from the past.
Story.311.2: You need someone to confide in.
Story.315.2: I won't accept defeat this time.
Story.316.2: There's a special "magic" hidden in everyone's heart.
Story.317.2: Shared laughter and tears define the bonds of friendship.
Story.318.2: Some things change, while others stay...
Story.401.2: Once again, I'm covering the retreat—but with different allies by my side.
Story.402.2: Wishes are things you make happen with your own hands.
Story.403.2: A dream beyond, a person in front.
Story.404.2: Some truths, once heard, cannot be escaped.
Story.405.2: Strict adherence to a promise is not always a virtue.
Story.406.2: Since the truth cannot be told, you shall become Nazuka's help.
Story.407.2: As long as Nazuka's secret is kept, the promise is not broken.
Story.408.2: There is no single best tactic, only the most appropriate one.
Story.409.2: Muscle memory is not something you can simply forget.
Story.410.2: More troops always mean better odds.
Story.411.2: Everyone has something to protect, and what that is differs for each soul.
Story.412.2: The cheapest peace requires nothing more than sacrificing but one outsider.
Story.413.1: A Rain That Reads the Air
Story.413.2: When you cannot stop the rain, you simply raise an umbrella.
Story.414.2: Unexpected support arrives. The enemy is not unbreakable.
Story.415.2: That dream was perfect in every way, yet Nazuka wanted no part of it.
Story.416.2: A true promise needs no inscription.
Story.417.2: Cut the grass first, then fell the tree.
Story.501.2: Can a stone thrown on a whim strike the heart of the truth?
Story.502.2: The more dazzling the throne, the deeper the shadow it casts.
Story.503.2: Welcome to this gilded cage, exquisitely crafted, and utterly inescapable.
Story.504.2: To seize the prize, one must brave the danger.
Story.505.2: Those destined for greatness do not fuss over trifles.
Story.506.2: The visible truth is but the tip of the iceberg.
Story.507.2: That deafening boom? Merely the fireworks of inspiration!
Story.508.2: Tepid water neither boils to catch the eye, nor freezes to invite scorn.
Story.509.2: To possess untiring power is, in itself, a form of arrogance.
Story.510.2: String enough coincidences together, and they become inescapable destiny.
Story.511.2: Beware the cheese left conspicuously in the middle of the path.
Story.512.2: A gentle tug on a stray thread, and the impossible knot miraculously unravels.
Story.513.2: Truth is often rough and thorny, while false order is always smooth as jade.
Story.514.2: Evil fears the fangs of its own kind far more than the judgment of the sun.
Story.515.2: Desperation makes monsters of us all—and you are far from invincible.
Story.516.2: A single spark falls upon dry grass, igniting a glow in the silent night.
Story.517.2: As you chase the light, never forget the shadow trailing at your heels.
Story.518.2: To rewrite the ending, one must first step into the eye of the storm.
Story.519.2: As the dust settles, the moonlit ruins fall into an eerie peace.
Story.601.2: Things are looking bad. It's time to make a quick exit!
Story.602.2: Parting the tangled branches, the silhouette is the best guide.
Story.603.2: The wildly flailing vine is about to strangle itself.
Story.604.2: After turning away, the rift between us seems like an abyss.
Story.605.2:
Level the ruins, plant flowers—
And so, war never came to this place.
Story.606.2: The roundabout shortcut always conveniently leads to utter ruin.
Story.607.2: Once you hear the ice crack, the chance to escape has already passed.
Story.608.2: Beyond the lock lies the wasteland of power.
Story.609.2: The moth seeks the flame, only to see its truth before perishing.
Story.610.2: High wall ahead? Time to remember that pole vault trick!
Story.611.2: Once the game has begun, there is no path leading back.
Story.612.2: The prey lights the torch, burning through the hunter's net.
Story.613.2: A happy ending with everyone here... Truly a cause for celebration, isn't it?
Story.614.2: The tendrils of crisis have begun to draw upon terrifying nourishment.
Story.615.2: In the long silence, the rhythm of the heartbeat completes the confession.
Story.616.2: All hesitations and escape routes are sealed within this moment of sincerity.
Story.617.2: She's well aware that this path is not an easy one, and so...
Story.618.2: A damp fuse for your rival, and expired powder for you.
Story.619.2: Beneath the gloom, only the curtain of trust can shield us from the storm.
Story.620.2: The blade flashes past, her eyes bloodshot and wild, glaring with fury—
Story.621.2: She has swallowed too much of the flames of rage, and her roar abruptly ceases at that moment.
Story.622.2: Though the flames have died down, the lingering heat beneath the ashes still burns the touch.
Story.6501.2: Such a small crowd? This is no fun at all.
Story.6502.2: The desert wind will never reach Philae.
Story.6503.2: Finally, I get to meet you face-to-face.
Story.6504.2: Dusk is the hour when one's mind can easily drift into a daze.
Story.6506.2: Memories of the past do not linger fondly.
Story.6507.2: Can you truly believe what you see?
Story.6508.2: Let me be a weirdo who honors every promise.
Story.6509.2: It's not just the identity that has changed.
Story.6510.2: Make the world a different place.
Story.6511.2: No matter where you are, I wish you a wonderful night.
Story.6512.2: It solidified into golden specimens, alongside a vanished dream.
